ads.description: A Scatter Dodgeball game set (Swimways/Coop, # 34701). The game set is new and still contained in the original packaging. The packaging does show some (see photos), but it doesn't affect the game components. A great game to add to your collection or to just play and enjoy. About the game... Each player begins with two same-colored wristbands. And the beginning of each round, players form a circle around the dodgeball and one player rolls the dice. Any player who is wearing a wristband that matches the color on the side of the dice when the dice comes to rest may pick up the dodgeball while the other players scatter. If player throwing the dodgeball throws and hits another player, that player has to give the thrower one of their wristbands. If player throws the dodgeball and another player catches it, then player throwing has to give one wristband to the player who caught the ball. First player to collect all the wristbands wins. Game includes: One sting-proof dodgeball. One colored foam dice. Twelve colored wristbands (6 colors). Game rules.

ads.description: 1975 Gottlieb 300 pinball machine with a bowling theme. It’s an EM (electro mechanical) 4 player game. I have cleaned all the score reels. I removed almost everything from the playfield and cleaned it, touched up paint, leveled all the inserts, cleaned all the plastics, all new rubbers and waxed.
